Japanese: ‥‥どうやら、見えましたよ‥‥
English: I think I see it...

Japanese: 何が‥‥ですかな？
English: See what...?

Japanese: ‥‥小学校のころ、あなたは 通信簿でよく、こう書かれた。
English: When you were in grade school, you received the same report card every year.

Japanese: 『悪あがきするが、効果はウスい』 ‥‥ちがいますか？
English: "Gets into lots of mischief trying to be the center of attention."

Japanese: どどどど、どうしてそれを‥‥ッ！
English: Wh-What do you mean...!?

Japanese: ‥‥さきほどの新聞記事です。
English: ...This newspaper clipping.

Japanese: 哀牙探偵と、警備員のカッコウを した、天杉　優作‥‥
English: It has a picture of you and Ron DeLite in his guard uniform.

Japanese: 仮面マスクは、袋小路で 消えたワケではなかった。
English: It seems that Mask☆DeMasque didn't just disappear into thin air.

Japanese: 衣装を脱いで‥‥ポリバケツに かくしただけだったのです。
English: He just took off his outfit... and hid it in a bucket.

Japanese: なんという‥‥ ヒトをバカにした話でしょう‥‥
English: That... That sounds far too stupid to be true.

Japanese: これでは、名探偵どころか、 コドモすらだませません。
English: Correct. With tricks like that he couldn't fool a baby, let alone an Ace Detective.

Japanese: ‥‥哀牙さん！　あなたは このとき、知ったのです！
English: And that's when you figured it out, Mr. Atmey!

Japanese: 仮面マスクは、このたよりなくも 図々しい、天杉　優作だと！
English: That's when you learned that under his mask, Mask☆DeMasque was really Ron DeLite!
Ggg... Nnn... Urkk...

Japanese: なんだよ‥‥アイツ、 怪人じゃなかったのか‥‥？
English: What the... Wasn't he supposed to be Mask☆DeMasque...?

Japanese: それどころか‥‥名探偵ですら なかったみたいだぜ！
English: Not only that... it looks like he wasn't even an Ace Detective!

Japanese: ガッカリね。うすぎたない 脅迫者だった、なんて‥‥
English: I can't believe it. He was just a slimy blackmailer...

Japanese: ヒキョウだぜ！ 名探偵ヅラしやがってさあ‥‥
English: What a fraud! Trying to pass himself off as an Ace Detective...

Japanese: キ‥‥キサマ！　言わせておけば ‥‥調子に乗りおってェェェ！
English: Why you! How dare you expose me like that...!

Japanese: オレは‥‥わ、我は‥‥ きょ、脅迫者などではない！
English: Why I... I mean, I've never blackmailed anyone in my life...!

Japanese: ほ‥‥ホコリ高き名探偵であり、 そして‥‥怪盗なのだッ！
English: I-I'm a famous and proud Ace Detective, and... and also Mask☆DeMasque!

Japanese: なぜ、それがわからないッ！
English: Why can't you understand that!?

Japanese: あなたは‥‥ホコリ高くも怪盗でも ‥‥まして名探偵でもない。
English: I'm afraid you are neither a proud thief, nor an Ace Detective.

Japanese: 脅迫者にして、殺人犯人。 それがあなたの正体なのです！
English: You're a blackmailer and a murderer. That is your true identity!

Japanese: グ愚‥‥く苦苦苦オオ悪悪悪オ‥‥
English: Wh-Wh-Why YOUUUUUU!

Japanese: さよう！　愚にして戯なる民どもに 我が高邁なる御霊など、理解不能！
English: How dare you even dare toimplythatoneso smartandcapableasI

Japanese: 貴殿らの暴戻不遜たる罵詈雑言は、 悪逆無道にして人面獣心なる蛮行！
English: couldeverfalltosuch lowlydepths! Whynot trydoingsomething

Japanese: 阿鼻叫喚悪人正機な百鬼夜行的蒙昧 夜郎自大の阿修羅道は悪人正機なる
English: yourselveswiththose bigmouthsofyours! You'reallfools!Fools

Japanese: 満身創痍神出鬼没美人薄命信賞必罰 夜露死苦四捨五入東西南北四字熟語
English: I say!Noneofyoucan comparetomygenius... You'realljustjealous!

Japanese: さあれ！　我をさげすむがいい！ 迷探偵にして不可解人たる我をッ！
English: Sogoon!Desecrateme! Commemorateme!There isnothingthegreat

Japanese: 殺人者！　脅迫者！　魑魅魍魎たる 我は闇を跳梁跋扈する孤高の奇人！
English: AceDetectivecannothandle! Blackmail!Murder!Threats! I'llgetawaywithallofit!

Japanese: あーっはっはっはっはっはっはっ！ 笑いとばしていただきたいッ‥‥！
English: Aaaah ha ha ha ha ha ha! It's enough to make one laugh...!

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら‥‥今度こそ、 コタエが出たようですな。
English: It would seem we've finally gotten to the real answer.

Japanese: スゴいハクリョクだったね。 ‥‥アイガ探偵。
English: That was... quite a performance by Mr. Atmey...

Japanese: 係官！　星威岳　哀牙の 留置の用意を‥‥
English: Bailiff! Please prepare a cell for Mr. Atmey...

Japanese: ‥‥早すぎる木槌‥‥ カッコつかねえぜ。
English: The hammer that strikes too fast has no time to aim.

Japanese: ど、どういうことですか！ 私はすでに、判決の用意を‥‥
English: Wh-What do you mean! I'm already prepared to deliver my sentence...

Japanese: ‥‥ひとつだけ言っておく。
English: Allow me to say one thing.

Japanese: 裁くのは‥‥このオレだぜ！
English: I... will be the one to judge!

Japanese: ‥‥ショーゲキ的な 宣言が飛び出したよ。
English: You don't get much more in your face than that...

Japanese: 今ひとつ‥‥ツメがアマかった ようだぜ、まるほどう。
English: It appears... that your claws weren't quite sharp enough, Mr. Trite.

Japanese: な‥‥なんだと‥‥！
English: Wh... Where do you...!?

Japanese: たしかに‥‥アンタは いろんなコトを立証したさ。
English: It's true that you've proven a lot of things.

Japanese: ‥‥星威岳　哀牙は、 サイテーの脅迫者だったこと。
English: ...Things like Luke Atmey was a filthy blackmailer.

Japanese: ‥‥事件当夜、高菱屋の 地下倉庫にはいなかったこと‥‥
English: ...And that he wasn't at Lordly Tailor the night of the murder.

Japanese: そうです！　だからこそ、 ブスジマ社長を‥‥
English: That's right! That's why he's the one who killed Mr. Bull--

Japanese: だが‥‥。
English: But...

Japanese: １つだけ‥‥立証して いないコトがある。
English: There's still one thing you have yet to prove.

Japanese: それは、いったい‥‥？
English: What's that...?

Japanese: 倉庫にいなかったからといって‥‥ 殺人現場にいたとはかぎらねえ。
English: Just because he wasn't at the warehouse doesn't mean he was at the murder scene.

Japanese: このサイテーヤロウが事件当時、 ＫＢ警備の社長室にいたコト！
English: Therefore, if you can't prove that this pitiful excuse for a man was at KB Security...

Japanese: そいつが立証されないかぎり、 判決は下せねえハズだぜ！
English: ...then I don't see how a verdict can be delivered!

Japanese: な‥‥なんですってえぇぇッ！
English: No... No waaaaaaaaaay!

Japanese: 静粛に！　静粛に！ ‥‥いかがですか、弁護人！
English: Order! Order in the court! ...Well, Mr. Wright!?

Japanese: （‥‥こ‥‥今度こそ、 サイゴのポイントだ‥‥！）
English: (Th-This is it... This is the final round...!)

Japanese: （事件当時‥‥哀牙がＫＢ警備の 社長室にいたこと‥‥）
English: I've got to prove that Atmey was at Mr. Bullard's office on that night...

Japanese: で、でも‥‥！　そんなコト、 立証できるの？
English: B-But...! Can you really prove that?

Japanese: そこまでだ。まるほどう‥‥ コタエを聞かせてもらうぜ。
English: That's long enough. Mr. Trite... I want to hear your answer.

Japanese: あの晩、哀牙探偵は ＫＢ警備にいた。弁護側は‥‥
English: That night, Luke Atmey was at KB Security, and the defense...

Japanese: 弁護側は‥‥ 証拠品で立証します！
English: The defense can prove it! With evidence!

Japanese: だ‥‥だいじょうぶなのですか？
English: Are you sure?

Japanese: クッ‥‥！　シンパイはいらねえ。 オレが見届けてやるさ。
English: Ha...! Don't you worry. I'll watch over you.

Japanese: ‥‥アンタの散りゆくサマを。
English: ...As you break down and fall to pieces.

Japanese: それでは、証明して いただきましょう！
English: Very well then, let's see this proof!

Japanese: あの晩、星威岳　哀牙が ＫＢ警備の社長室にいたことを！
English: Proof that Luke Atmey was at KB Security that night!

Japanese: これが‥‥その証拠ですッ！
English: This is the proof!

Japanese: ‥‥たしかに‥‥ ここは重要な局面です。
English: It's true... That is very important.

Japanese: しかし、苦しまぎれの証拠が とおるほど、アマくありません！
English: However, I'm not so foolish as to think that will pass for evidence here!

Japanese: まるほどう‥‥アンタも 人生のアジを知るべきだな‥‥
English: Mr. Trite... It's time you learned the true flavor of life...

Japanese: ‥‥この、 ゴドー・ブレンド４９号のような！
English: The flavor of my special Godot Blend #49!

Japanese: いかがですかな‥‥弁護人。
English: Well, Mr. Wright?

Japanese: ニガいです。とても。
English: It's bitter. ...Very bitter.

Japanese: なるほどくん！　ダメだよ！ ここまで来たんだから‥‥
English: Come on, Nick! Don't give up now!

Japanese: （どうする‥‥！　ここで判断を まちがうと、おしまいだぞ‥‥）
English: (What do I do...!? If I make a mistake here, it's over...)

Japanese: ‥‥立証は‥‥できません。 I...
English: I can't prove it.

Japanese: やはり‥‥ムリですか。
English: Just as I thought.

Japanese: ‥‥しかし！　さらに 哀牙探偵の証言を聞けば‥‥
English: ...But! If we hear more of Detective Atmey's testimony...

Japanese: ザンネンながら‥‥ ここまでだ、まるほどう。
English: Unfortunately... That's as far as you go, Mr. Trite.

Japanese: ‥‥ど、どういうことですか？
English: Wh-What do you mean?

Japanese: これ以上の証言は、オレが ユルさねえ‥‥そういうコトだ。
English: I won't allow for any more testimony... That's what I mean.

Japanese: なんですって‥‥
English: What...?

Japanese: 忘れたのか？　星威岳　哀牙は今、 裁判を中断して、ここへ来ている。
English: Have you forgotten? Luke Atmey is here after we interrupted his own trial.

Japanese: アンタは‥‥殺人罪の立証に シッパイしたのさ！
English: And you have failed to prove that he committed the murder!

Japanese: この証人には‥‥そろそろ 自分の法廷に戻ってもらうぜ。
English: I think it's time for this witness to return to his own trial...

Japanese: 《怪人☆仮面マスク》としての 有罪判決を受けるために‥‥
English: ...and face his guilty verdict as Mask☆DeMasque.

Japanese: そ、そんな‥‥
English: N-No...

Japanese: やあれ、弁護士殿！　やはり、 最後は愛が勝つのですよ！
English: Well now, Sir Lawyer! It seems that love wins out in the end after all!

Japanese: 我こそは、名探偵にして怪人！ 判決がそれをウラづけるでしょう！
English: I am the Ace Detective as well as Mask☆DeMasque! My verdict will verify that!

Japanese: そして‥‥天杉　優作こそ、 真犯人である！
English: Just as Ron DeLite's will verify that he is the true murderer!

Japanese: 名探偵として、この我が 断言いたしましょうぞッ！
English: I declare that with the full force of my Ace Detective-ness!

Japanese: 静粛に！　静粛に！　静粛に！ この証人の審理は‥‥ここまで！
English: Order! Order in the court! That's enough deliberation over this witness!

Japanese: （な‥‥なんてこった‥‥！ これじゃ、優作くんは‥‥）
English: (I-I can't believe this...! At this rate, Ron is...)

Japanese: あ、あきらめちゃダメだよ、 なるほどくん！
English: D-Don't give up now, Nick!

Japanese: ‥‥まだ、明日があるじゃない！ もう一度、証拠をさがして‥‥
English: We still have tomorrow! We can look for more evidence and...

Japanese: それじゃあ‥‥ もう、おそいんだよ‥‥
English: By then, it'll be too late...

Japanese: ‥‥え。ど、どうして！
English: Huh? Wh-Why!?

Japanese: “一事不再審”‥‥ 裁判の基本原則を知ってるかい？
English: "Double Jeopardy"... One of the basic rules of any court of law.

Japanese: いちじふさいしん‥‥？
English: "Double Jeopardy"...?

Japanese: 《ある罪状で裁判にかけられて、 無罪判決を受けた場合‥‥》
English: "Should a defendant be tried and found innocent in court..."

Japanese: 《その被告人は、同じ罪状では 二度と起訴されることはない》
English: "That defendant cannot be tried again for the same crime."

Japanese: これが、裁判の大原則なのです。 そして、それは‥‥
English: This is a fundamental rule of all courts.

Japanese: この証人の場合にも、 モチロン当てはまります。
English: And it applies to this witness as much as it applies to anyone else.

Japanese: 星威岳　哀牙はこの後、ただちに 有罪判決を受けるハズだ。
English: Mr. Atmey will be found guilty in a matter of minutes.

Japanese: 《怪人☆仮面マスク》として。 それはつまり‥‥
English: Guilty as "Mask☆DeMasque". Which means...

Japanese: 毒島　黒兵衛の殺害においては 無実である、というコトなのです。
English: He will be innocent as far as the murder of Kane Bullard is concerned.

Japanese: そ、そんな‥‥
English: No way...

Japanese: ‥‥今、この場で 罪を立証できなかった以上‥‥
English: The fact that you were unable to prove Mr. Atmey's guilt of that crime here...

Japanese: 星威岳　哀牙が殺人罪で裁かれる ことは‥‥二度とないでしょう。
English: ...means that he will never again be tried as Kane Bullard's murderer.

Japanese: う‥‥‥ うわああああああああっ！
English: U...Uwaaaaaaaaaah!

Japanese: （これで‥‥勝利への道は 閉ざされた‥‥）
English: (Now there's nothing I can possibly do to win...)

Japanese: （たとえ、優作くんの無罪判決を 勝ち取れたとしても‥‥）
English: (Even if Ron is proclaimed to be innocent...)

Japanese: （‥‥真犯人に‥‥星威岳　哀牙に 逃げられてしまったら‥‥）
English: (...the real killer, Luke Atmey, will go free.)

Japanese: ‥‥この法廷における証人の 発言は、すべて尋問されました。
English: You have cross-examined every statement the witness has made here today.

Japanese: そして、これ以上の証言が ない以上‥‥
English: And as long as there is no more testimony...

Japanese: これで、この証人の尋問は 終了したと言わざるを得ません！
English: I'm afraid I have to declare that there will be no further questioning of this witness!

Japanese: ‥‥異議はありませんね？
English: Are there any objections?

Japanese: それでは、星威岳　哀牙に対する 尋問を、終了します！
English: Then I hereby end the cross- examination of Luke Atmey!

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら‥‥見えたようね。
English: I think... I see it.

Japanese: 裁判長。あなたは小学校のころ、 通信簿でよく、こう書かれた。
English: Your Honor. When you were in a child, this is what was on your report card every year.

Japanese: 『耳がとほく、聞きちがひをする』 ‥‥ちがうかしら？
English: "Has poor hearing, and often makes mistakes as a result."

Japanese: ‥‥どどどど、どうしてそれをッ！
English: H-H-H-H-How did you...!?

Japanese: ‥‥なるほどくん。 カオをあげなさい。
English: ...Phoenix. Raise your head up high.

Japanese: 私が言ったこと‥‥忘れたの？
English: Have you forgotten what I used to tell you?

Japanese: 弁護士は‥‥ピンチのときほど、 ふてぶてしく笑うものよ。
English: A lawyer is someone who smiles no matter how bad it gets.

Japanese: （‥‥こ、この声‥‥まさか！）
English: (Th-That voice... No way!)

Japanese: ひさしぶりね‥‥なるほどくん。
English: Long time no see, Phoenix.

Japanese: 千尋さんッ！
English: Mia!

Japanese: （これが‥‥倉院流霊媒道の 本当のチカラ‥‥）
English: (This is the true power of the Kurain Channeling Technique...)

Japanese: （ぼくの目の前にいるのは “真宵ちゃん”だけど‥‥）
English: (I know that it's really "Maya" who's standing before me...)

Japanese: （今はちがう。“彼女”は‥‥ ぼくの師匠、綾里　千尋さんだ）
English: (But right now, she's my mentor, Mia Fey.)

Japanese: さあ‥‥一気に行くわよ！
English: Now... Let's do this!

Japanese: で、でも‥‥！ ムリだよ、千尋さん！
English: B-But...! There's nothing more we can do, Mia!

Japanese: 証言が終わった以上、 尋問なんて‥‥
English: Without any more testimony, I can't cross-examine...

Japanese: ‥‥まだよ。 証言は終わっていないわ。
English: Not yet... The testimony's not over yet.

Japanese: ど‥‥どういうコトですか？
English: Wh... What do you mean?

Japanese: 裁判長！　先ほど、 こうおっしゃいましたね。
English: Your Honor! Just now you said something very interesting.

Japanese: 『証人の発言は、すべて《証言》 として尋問された』‥‥と。
English: "You have cross-examined every statement the witness has made here today."

Japanese: そ、そうですが‥‥。
English: Y-Yes, that's true, but...

Japanese: ザンネンながら、裁判長は 忘れていることがあります。
English: Unfortunately, Your Honor, you're forgetting something.

Japanese: さきほど‥‥最後の尋問が 終了してから、
English: Earlier, after the last cross-examination...

Japanese: この証人は一度、《発言》を しているではないですか！
English: ...this witness made a number of remarks!

Japanese: やあれ、弁護士殿！　やはり、 最後は愛が勝つのですよ！
English: Well now, Sir Lawyer! It seems that love wins out in the end after all!

Japanese: 我こそは、名探偵にして怪人！ 判決がそれをウラづけるでしょう！
English: I am the Ace Detective as well as Mask☆DeMasque! My verdict will verify that!

Japanese: そして‥‥天杉　優作こそ、 真犯人である！
English: Just as Ron DeLite's will verify that he is the true murderer!

Japanese: 名探偵として、この我が 断言いたしましょうぞッ！
English: I declare that with the full force of my Ace Detective-ness!

Japanese: し‥‥しかし‥‥ この発言に、いかなる重要性が‥‥
English: Y-Yes, but... These comments appear to have no importance whatso--

Japanese: それは‥‥尋問で アキラカになるでしょう。
English: Very well... Then we shall prove their importance via cross-examination.

Japanese: とにかく！　証人の発言が あった以上‥‥
English: At any rate! As long as the witness has made these remarks...

Japanese: 弁護側は、尋問のケンリを 主張します！
English: ...we, the defense, assert our right to question them!

Japanese: よろしいですね？　‥‥検事さん。
English: Is that alright with you... Prosecutor?

Japanese: ど‥‥どうしましたか？ ゴドー検事‥‥
English: Is... something the matter? Mr. Godot...
Ah, nothing.

Japanese: やあれ、弁護士殿！ 一足、おそかったようですな！
English: Oh, Sir Lawyer! It looks like you're one step too late!

Japanese: そのような虚言、 この哀牙には‥‥
English: If you think such falsehoods will do anything to me, Luke At--

Japanese: ‥‥しかたねえ。
English: ...Let's hear it.
Huh...?

Japanese: たしかに、証人は 《発言》をしちまった。
English: It's true that the witness made some "remarks".

Japanese: 最後の尋問‥‥ やってもらおうじゃねえか。
English: So then... Let's hear this last bit of cross-examination.

Japanese: け‥‥検事殿！ それはいったい‥‥
English: M-Mr. Godot! What are you...?

Japanese: それでは、星威岳　哀牙さん。
English: Very well then, Luke Atmey.

Japanese: 先ほどの発言に対して、弁護側の 尋問を認めたいと思います。
English: I'll allow the defense to cross-examine your earlier remarks.

Japanese: “被告人を真犯人と断定できる 理由”‥‥について。
English: The defense would like to hear why you declare the defendant to be the true murderer.

Japanese: 最後に、もう一度‥‥ 証言を命じます！
English: So please, give us one last bit of testimony!

Japanese: あ‥‥あいや‥‥
English: I... Err...

Japanese: ‥‥いいわね、なるほどくん。 今度こそ‥‥最後のチャンスよ。
English: Phoenix? This is it. This is our absolute last chance.

Japanese: は‥‥はい！
English: Y-Yes, Chief!

Japanese: ～最後の証言～
English: -- The Last Testimony --

Japanese: さよう、たしかに我はあの晩、 高菱屋にはいませんでしたな。
English: Indeed, it is true that I was not at Lordly Tailor.

Japanese: さる重大な事件の依頼について、 どうしても行かねばならなかった。
English: I had to leave to see about another vitally important job request.

Japanese: 前もって、日取りがわかっていた ので、この写真を用意したのです。
English: I had known about the date beforehand, so I had this photograph readied.

Japanese: 真犯人が天杉　優作であることは、 美しきスイリが我にささやく真実。
English: My brilliant deduction was what informed me that the true culprit was Ron DeLite.

Japanese: サイフとキーカードより、彼が 事件当時、現場にいたのは明白。
English: And thanks to the Key Card and Wallet, it was abundantly clear that he was there.

Japanese: また、一度だけ鳴った非常ブザー。 ここからも、スイリは可能です。
English: I was also able to make a deduction from the buzzer, which only sounded once.

Japanese: あのボタンには、指紋が 残っていなかった。‥‥なぜか？
English: The button did not have any fingerprints on it... Why?

Japanese: 被害者が鳴らせば、指紋が残った。 つまり‥‥鳴らしたのは、犯人。
English: The victim would have left prints if he sounded it. Which means the killer sounded it.

Japanese: 彼は仮面マスクの衣装を着ていた。 だから指紋が残らなかったのです。
English: Mr. DeLite was wearing his Mask☆DeMasque outfit, which is why he left no prints.

Japanese: そして、脅迫状。宝石の色など、 被害者の書きまちがいでしょう。
English: And, the blackmail letter? The victim likely just mistook the color of the jewel.

Japanese: ズヴァリ！　すべての証拠は、 あわれなる青年を示しているッ！
English: Zvarri! Therefore, all the evidence points to that poor boy!

Japanese: （この証言‥‥意外に スジが通っているな‥‥）
English: (This testimony actually seems to hold up pretty well...)

Japanese: 先ほどの証人の発言は、不用意な モノではなかったようです。
English: The witness's earlier remarks do not appear to have been hastily prepared.

Japanese: すべての点が説明され、ムジュン している部分は、ありません。
English: All of his points have been explained, and none of them seem to contradict anything.

Japanese: ‥‥当然、ですな。
English: ...But of course.

Japanese: しかし‥‥なぜ、非常ブザーの コトを、ご存じなのですかな？
English: But... How did you know about the emergency buzzer?

Japanese: ‥‥警察の捜査資料など、 我が名探偵にはツツヌケなのです。
English: The police investigation documents went directly through me...

Japanese: 調書には、すべて目を通す。 キホンですな、弁護士殿ッ！
English: And I always look over all the documents. It's elementary, Sir Lawyer!
Grr...

Japanese: この上、悪あがきをするつもりか？ 弁護士センセイよお‥‥。
English: Are you going to make even more trouble for us now, Sir Lawyer...?

Japanese: それは、この私がユルしません。 ‥‥成歩堂くん。
English: I will not allow any of your usual shenanigans, Mr. Wright.

Japanese: は、はい。
English: Y-Yes, Your Honor.

Japanese: 星威岳　哀牙の裁判を、これ以上 中止させておくコトはできません。
English: We cannot postpone Luke Atmey's trial any longer.

Japanese: ‥‥あなたに、一度だけ。 チャンスを与えましょう。
English: This is... your last chance!

Japanese: ちょ、ちょっと待ってください！ ‥‥一度だけ、なんて‥‥！
English: H-Hang on a sec! Just one chance...!?

Japanese: クッ‥‥！　どうやら、 パーティーはお開き、みたいだぜ。
English: Ha...! It seems that the party's about to begin.

Japanese: ‥‥どう？　なるほどくん。
English: ...Well, Phoenix?

Japanese: 今の証言にムジュンしている 証拠品なんて、ありませんよ！
English: There isn't any evidence that contradicts with that testimony!

Japanese: ‥‥そのようね。
English: ...So it would seem.

Japanese: そ、“そのようね”‥‥って‥‥
English: Wh-What do you mean, "So it would seem"...?

Japanese: いい？　なるほどくん。 ムジュンを指摘する方法は‥‥
English: Listen, Phoenix. Pointing out contradictions...

Japanese: 何も、証拠品をつきつけるだけじゃ ないでしょう？
English: ...doesn't always mean you have to present evidence... does it?

Japanese: いずれにせよ‥‥ これが最後のチャンスよ。
English: At any rate, this is our last chance.

Japanese: 《決定的なムジュン》を 指摘できなければ‥‥
English: If you can't point out a case-breaking contradiction...

Japanese: あなたの負け。 ‥‥それだけのことよ。
English: ...you lose. That's all there is to it.

Japanese: ‥‥１７杯目。 これが、最後の１杯。
English: ...Cup number 17. The last cup.

Japanese: この裁判も、どうやら 終わらせるときが来たようだぜ。
English: It seems like the time has come to put an end to this trial.

Japanese: （‥‥この証言の中に、致命的な ムジュンを見つけだすんだ‥‥）
English: (I have to find a fatal contradiction in this testimony...)

Japanese: （そして‥‥証拠品をつきつける 以外の方法で、暴き出す！）
English: (And... I need to point it out without presenting evidence!)

Japanese: （‥‥《ゆさぶる》しかない、か。 ムジュンしている発言を‥‥！）
English: (Which means all I can do is find the contradictory remark and press it...!)

Japanese: いいわね。 チャンスは‥‥たった一度よ！
English: Remember! You only get one chance!

Japanese: それでは、弁護人。 最後の尋問をおねがいします！
English: Very well then, Mr. Wright. Please begin your final cross-examination!

Japanese: ～最後の証言～
English: -- The Last Testimony --

Japanese: さよう、たしかに我はあの晩、 高菱屋にはいませんでしたな。
English: Indeed, it is true that I was not at Lordly Tailor.

Japanese: さる重大な事件の依頼について、 どうしても行かねばならなかった。
English: I had to leave to see about another vitally important job request.

Japanese: 前もって、日取りがわかっていた ので、この写真を用意したのです。
English: I had known about the date beforehand, so I had this photograph readied.

Japanese: 真犯人が天杉　優作であることは、 美しきスイリが我にささやく真実。
English: My brilliant deduction was what informed me that the true culprit was Ron DeLite.

Japanese: サイフとキーカードより、彼が 事件当時、現場にいたのは明白。
English: And thanks to the Key Card and Wallet, it was abundantly clear that he was there.

Japanese: また、一度だけ鳴った非常ブザー。 ここからも、スイリは可能です。
English: I was also able to make a deduction from the buzzer, which only sounded once.

Japanese: あのボタンには、指紋が 残っていなかった。‥‥なぜか？
English: The button did not have any fingerprints on it... Why?

Japanese: 被害者が鳴らせば、指紋が残った。 つまり‥‥鳴らしたのは、犯人。
English: The victim would have left prints if he sounded it. Which means the killer sounded it.

Japanese: 彼は仮面マスクの衣装を着ていた。 だから指紋が残らなかったのです。
English: Mr. DeLite was wearing his Mask☆DeMasque outfit, which is why he left no prints.

Japanese: そして、脅迫状。宝石の色など、 被害者の書きまちがいでしょう。
English: And, the blackmail letter? The victim likely just mistook the color of the jewel.

Japanese: ズヴァリ！　すべての証拠は、 あわれなる青年を示しているッ！
English: Zvarri! Therefore, all the evidence points to that poor boy!

Japanese: （アイツのトドメを刺すチャンスは ‥‥この尋問しかない！）
English: (This cross-examination is the only chance I have to nail him!)

Japanese: （どこか、１つ‥‥決定的な ムジュンを探すんだ‥‥！）
English: (Somewhere there's a huge contradiction, and I've got to find it...!)

Japanese: 私の見たところ‥‥証拠品との ムジュンは、見あたらないわ。
English: As far as I can see, there is no evidence that contradicts his testimony.

Japanese: 《ゆさぶる》しかないわね。 ただ、１回だけ‥‥。
English: All you can do is press him. And you only get one shot.

Japanese: 哀牙さん。今の発言ですが‥‥
English: Mr. Atmey. About this last remark...

Japanese: ‥‥わかってねえな、まるほどう。
English: ...You still don't get it, do you, Trite?

Japanese: ちまちまゆさぶってる 場合じゃねえんだぜ。
English: This isn't the time to be pressing the witness on every little statement.
Wha...

Japanese: ‥‥さっきも言ったが‥‥
English: I said this before...

Japanese: アンタは１つだけ、 立証していないコトがある。
English: There's still one thing you haven't proven.

Japanese: コイツが事件当時、ＫＢ警備の 社長室にいた‥‥その１点だ。
English: That this scum was in Kane Bullard's office that night...

Japanese: どうやら、最後の１杯‥‥ 飲み干しちまうぜッ！
English: And now... it's time for me to drink my last cup!

Japanese: ‥‥それでは、弁護人。 ヤクソクは守っていただきます。
English: Mr. Wright. I will hold you to your end of the bargain.

Japanese: 哀牙さん。今の発言ですが‥‥
English: Mr. Atmey. About this last remark...

Japanese: ‥‥わかってねえな、まるほどう。
English: ...You still don't get it, do you, Trite?

Japanese: ちまちまゆさぶってる 場合じゃねえんだぜ。
English: This isn't the time to be pressing the witness on every little statement.

Japanese: ‥‥わかってないのは あなたのほうですよ、ゴドー検事。
English: I'm afraid you're the one who still doesn't get it, Mr. Godot.

Japanese: な‥‥なんだと‥‥？
English: Wh-What...?

Japanese: ‥‥哀牙さん。 ついに、認めましたね‥‥。
English: Mr. Atmey. It seems you have finally admitted...

Japanese: あの晩‥‥殺人現場、ＫＢ警備の 社長室にいたことを‥‥
English: ...that you were in the CEO's office, on the night of the murder.

Japanese: な‥‥なな、ナニをバカな！
English: H-How can you say that!?

Japanese: たった今‥‥あなたは こう発言しました。
English: Let's review your testimony, shall we, Mr. Atmey?

Japanese: “非常ブザーのボタンに 指紋が残っていなかったのは‥‥”
English: "The button did not have any fingerprints on it... Why?"

Japanese: “天杉　優作が怪人☆仮面マスクの 衣装を着ていたからだ”‥‥と。
English: "Mr. DeLite was wearing his Mask☆DeMasque outfit." Is that correct?

Japanese: い、いかにも！ このスイリに、マチガイなど‥‥
English: I-Indeed! That's what I said! My deductions are absolutely foolproof...

Japanese: 哀牙さん。‥‥どうして、あなたが それを知っているのですか？
English: More like your deductions prove that you're a fool.

Japanese: ‥‥し、シツレイ。 どういうコトですかな？
English: ...I, I'm sorry. Whatever do you mean?

Japanese: ‥‥なんか、ノドが かわいてきやがった‥‥
English: For some reason, I'm starting to get really thirsty...

Japanese: “優作くんが犯行現場に行ったとき 怪人の衣装を着ていた”‥‥
English: When exactly did we learn the fact that...

Japanese: ぼくたちが、そのジジツを知った のは‥‥いつのことでしたか？
English: ...Ron DeLite was dressed as Mask☆DeMasque when he went to the scene of the crime?

Japanese: そ、それは‥‥たしか‥‥
English: Th-That was... Um...

Japanese: つい、さっき‥‥ 数時間前のことだ。
English: It was... just a few hours ago.

Japanese: ６杯目のコーヒーが、さめた視線で オレを見つめた、あのときだぜ。
English: Back when my sixth cup was looking at me with a cold stare.

Japanese: ‥‥あれ。そういえばコレ、 言ってませんでしたっけ。
English: Huh? Oh, did I forget to mention it before...?

Japanese: スミマセン。今まで、言い出す チャンスがなくて‥‥
English: I'm sorry. I just never had a chance to mention it up until now...

Japanese: ‥‥そう。被告人は、その情報を だれにも話していなかった！
English: That's right. The defendant had yet to tell anyone else this fact before this morning.

Japanese: それを知り得たのは‥‥今日、 この法廷にいた人間だけなのです。
English: Therefore, the only people who should know this are those who have been watching this trial.

Japanese: お‥‥‥おおおおおお‥‥
English: Grr... Nrgh...

Japanese: おわかりになりましたか？ ‥‥哀牙探偵。
English: Do you understand now, Detective Atmey?

Japanese: あなたが、この情報を 知っているハズがないんです！
English: There is no way that you should have known about that!
Ah...

Japanese: あいやいやああああァァァァッ！
English: AAAAYEEEEHHH!!!

Japanese: あなたは今日、怪人☆仮面マスクと して、裁判を受けていた！
English: You were in the next courtroom, being tried as Mask☆DeMasque!

Japanese: ‥‥なのに、なぜ！ この情報を知っていたのですか！
English: So then, enlighten us! Just how did you know about that piece of information!?

Japanese: う‥‥クッ！　そ、それは‥‥
English: Urk...! W-Well...

Japanese: と‥‥とにかく！　この探偵は 知っていたんだ！
English: C-Come on! This detective must have known about it!

Japanese: おそらく‥‥もっと前に、 知るチャンスがあったんだろうぜ！
English: He probably had plenty of chances to find out beforehand!

Japanese: その“チャンス”が問題なのです！
English: And it's those "chances" that I want to discuss next!

Japanese: 《あの晩、優作くんが 仮面マスクの衣装を着ていた》
English: That night, "Mr. DeLite was wearing his Mask☆DeMasque outfit."

Japanese: 哀牙探偵が、それを知ることが できた可能性は‥‥
English: There is one, and only one way...

Japanese: ‥‥たった１つしか、 あり得ないのです！
English: ...for Detective Atmey to have found that out.

Japanese: たった１つの‥‥
English: Only one...

Japanese: 可能性‥‥だと‥‥！
English: ...One way, you say!?

Japanese: 思い出してください。 天杉　優作の証言を‥‥もう一度！
English: Please remember, if you will, Mr. DeLite's testimony!

Japanese: 社長室に入ったら、目の前に アヤシイ人影がヌッと出てきて‥‥
English: When I entered the office, there was a suspicious shadow there...

Japanese: ‥‥優作くんは一瞬、 真犯人を目撃していたんです。
English: For a second, my client witnessed the real killer.

Japanese: し‥‥しかし、天杉は そいつを見てねえんだぜ！
English: But Mr. DeLite never saw him!

Japanese: その“真犯人”が 哀牙だったかどうかは‥‥
English: There's no way to tell whether or not the "real killer" was Luke Atmey...

Japanese: その証言を‥‥ “逆転”させるんですよ。
English: It's with that statement that I'll turn this case on its head!

Japanese: ぎゃ‥‥ぎゃくてん、だと‥‥？
English: J-Just what are you implying!?

Japanese: “優作くんが真犯人を目撃した” ‥‥それを逆転させれば‥‥
English: "Mr. DeLite saw the real killer," correct? Now, if you turn that statement around...

Japanese: 真犯人もまた、優作くんを “目撃”していることになる！
English: ...it stands to follow that the real killer had also "seen" Ron DeLite!

Japanese: ま‥‥‥‥まさか‥‥ッ！
English: I-Impossible...

Japanese: 哀牙探偵！　あなたは事件当夜、 殺人現場で怪人を目撃したのです！
English: Detective Atmey, you saw Mask☆DeMasque at the murder scene that night!

Japanese: ブスジマ社長を殺害して 天杉　優作を殴った、そのときに！
English: You saw him when you killed Kane Bullard and assaulted Ron DeLite!

Japanese: 優作くんの衣装のコトを知る チャンスは、それ以外にない！
English: That was the only way you could have known what Ron was wearing!

Japanese: あーっはっはっはっはっはっはっ はっはっはっはっはっはっはっ‥‥
English: Hee hee hee ha ha ha Aha ha ha ha ha ha ha! Ho ho ho hee hee hee!

Japanese: ‥‥さあさあみなさん、 ごらんくださあい‥‥！
English: Take a good look, everyone!

Japanese: 天才にふさわしき好敵手を求めて、 ついに自ら犯罪に手を染めた‥‥
English: Unable to find a rival worthy of my genius, I was forced to create one by myself!

Japanese: あわれなピエロでござあい‥‥
English: Here I am! The tragic clown...

Japanese: ‥‥きのうと 同じコトを言ってます。
English: ...That's the same line you gave yesterday.

Japanese: でも‥‥、そのイミあいは だいぶちがうようですけどね。
English: But... I think there's a little more meaning behind it this time.

Japanese: あーっはっはっはっはっはっはっ はっはっはっはっはっはっはっ‥‥
English: Hee hee hee ha ha ha Aha ha ha ha ha ha ha! Ho ho ho hee hee hee!

Japanese: ‥‥フクザツな事件でした。
English: What an awfully complicated incident...

Japanese: 天杉　優作を脅迫した哀牙探偵が、 毒島　黒兵衛に脅迫されていた。
English: Kane Bullard was blackmailing Luke Atmey, who was in turn, blackmailing Ron DeLite.

Japanese: その脅迫者を殺害した哀牙探偵は、 罪を天杉　優作に着せようとした。
English: And upon killing his blackmailer, Luke Atmey tried to frame Ron DeLite.

Japanese: そして、殺人の罪を逃れるため、 怪人として有罪になろうとした‥‥
English: He then claimed to be guilty as Mask☆DeMasque in order to escape his true crime...

Japanese: ‥‥そのために 考え出されたのが‥‥
English: And to that end, he came up with this plan...

Japanese: 裁判の《一事不再審》の原則を利用 した、アリバイ作りだったのです。
English: ...to use the "Double Jeopardy" rule when making his alibi.

Japanese: あの‥‥
English: Umm...

Japanese: とにかく。‥‥どうやら、 真相にたどりつけたようですな。
English: At any rate... It would seem we've finally found the truth.

Japanese: スミマセン‥‥
English: Excuse me...

Japanese: ワレワレはもう少しで、無実の 青年に汚名を着せるところでした。
English: I came perilously close to besmirching the record of an innocent young man...

Japanese: おぞましき“殺人犯”の汚名を‥‥
English: ...Besmirching him with the title of "murderer"!

Japanese: ‥‥ボクのコト、 ムシしないでくださーーーい！
English: ...Don't ignore meeeeeeee!

Japanese: ‥‥あ。いたのですか。
English: ...Oh. I didn't realize you were there.

Japanese: （そりゃ、いるだろ‥‥）
English: (Why wouldn't he be...?)

Japanese: ‥‥あの。 判決のコトなんですけど‥‥
English: Um... About the verdict...

Japanese: わかっています。あなたは 殺人など、やっていません。
English: I know. You never committed any murder.

Japanese: ええ！　わかってもらえて うれしいです！　‥‥でも。
English: That's right! I'm so glad you understand that! But...

Japanese: ええと、ボク‥‥やっぱり 怪人☆仮面マスクなんでーーーす！
English: I, um... I really am Mask☆DeMaaaaasque!!!
Huh?

Japanese: きのう、その件で‥‥ ムザイ、になっちゃいましたよね。
English: So, thanks to that trial yesterday, I'm innocent now, right?
Uh...

Japanese: あの。《一事不再審》って 言うんでしたっけ、こういうの。
English: What was it you said? "Double Jeopardy"?

Japanese: 言われてみれば‥‥
English: Now that you mention it...

Japanese: ウッカリしてたぜ、コイツは。
English: I've been careless.

Japanese: （ウッカリ、って‥‥）
English: (Careless...?)

Japanese: ‥‥あの。どうなんですか？ 千尋さん。
English: Um... What do you think, Mia?

Japanese: 被告人の言うとおり《一事不再審》 の原則は、ゼッタイよ。
English: As the defendant says, the rule of "Double Jeopardy" is absolute.

Japanese: 無罪判決を受けた件では、 二度と起訴することはできない。
English: A defendant can never be tried twice for a crime in which he was once found innocent.

Japanese: じゃあ‥‥ムザイ、に なっちゃうんですか？　怪人。
English: Then... Mask☆DeMasque is really innocent?

Japanese: とりあえず‥‥ そうなっちゃうんじゃないかしら。
English: For now... it would seem so.

Japanese: （と、とりあえず‥‥）
English: (F-For now...)

Japanese: それでは！　そういうことで、 被告人に判決を言いわたします！
English: Now then! This court finds the defendant...

Japanese: いいのかなあ。トクした、って コトで‥‥‥‥いや。
English: Boy, this is really lucky... Wait, err, I...

Japanese: やっぱり、いくらなんでもそれは まずいよなあ。怪人だもんな、ボク
English: That isn't so good after all. You see the thing is, I still am Mask☆DeMasque after all

Japanese: 同日　午後　３時３５分 地方裁判所　被告人第４控え室
English: October 14, 3:35 PM District Court Defendant Lobby No. 4

Japanese: よくやってくれたわね、 なるほどくん！
English: You did it, Nick!

Japanese: ありがとう、千尋さん！ ずいぶん‥‥ひさしぶりですね。
English: Thanks, Mia! It's been a long time, hasn't it?

Japanese: ‥‥そうね。最近、真宵が 呼んでくれないものだから。
English: ...Yeah. It's because Maya doesn't call on me much these days.

Japanese: そ、そうなんですか。
English: Oh?

Japanese: それは冗談だけど。
English: I'm just joking, Phoenix. Don't take everything so seriously.

Japanese: あの子‥‥今、迷ってる みたいなの。
English: But on the other hand, Maya... She seems kind of lost these days.

Japanese: ‥‥倉院流霊媒道の 家元になること、ですか？
English: You mean about becoming the Master of the Kurain Channeling School?

Japanese: 家元をつぐことは‥‥ 母との別れをイミするから。
English: Becoming the Master... means saying goodbye to our mother.

Japanese: 綾里　舞子さん、ですか‥‥
English: You mean Misty Fey...?

Japanese: ‥‥そばにいてあげてね。 なるほどくん。
English: ...Watch over her, will you Phoenix?

Japanese: は‥‥はい。
English: Of course.

Japanese: じゃあ‥‥ また会いましょう。
English: Well then... See you around.

Japanese: （‥‥千尋さん‥‥）
あ！　な。成歩堂さん！
English: Ah! M-Mr. Wright!

Japanese: あの‥‥ボク！　その。 なんと言っていいのやら。
English: Um... I, Uh... I don't know what to say.

Japanese: おめでとう、優作くん。
English: Congratulations, Mr. DeLite.

Japanese: あああ、ありがとうございます！ ‥‥‥‥いや。どうなんだろ。
English: Th-Th-Thank you so much! Err, no, wait.

Japanese: ナニもかも、もう。どうでもいいと
English: Nothing really matters anymore though, now that all of this has happened

Japanese: もう！　スナオに 喜べばいいじゃないですか！
English: Come on! Just be happy already!

Japanese: 真宵ちゃん‥‥
English: Maya...

Japanese: サツジン容疑が晴れて、怪人の 無罪もオマケつきなんですよ！
English: You've been cleared of the murder charges and got off as Mask☆DeMasque to boot!

Japanese: でも‥‥そのかわり‥‥ボク。 すべてを失っちゃいましたから。
English: But, in exchange... I lost everything.

Japanese: ‥‥え。 どういうことですか？
English: ...Huh? What do you mean?

Japanese: ＫＢ警備をクビになったのも、 仮面マスクになったのも‥‥
English: Stealing security information from KB Security, becoming Mask☆DeMasque...

Japanese: 彼女のため、だったんです。
English: I did it all for one reason... For her.

Japanese: まれかさん‥‥ですか？
English: You mean your wife, Desirée?

Japanese: 彼女、犯罪者が 何よりもキライなんです。
English: She hates criminals more then anything.

Japanese: （強盗のヒトジチになったコトが ある、って言ってたっけ‥‥）
English: (Come to think of it, she was once held hostage by some robbers, wasn't she?)

Japanese: “ヒキョウなマネをする犯罪者 なんて、ユルせない！”って。
English: She always said how she hated sneaky criminals...

Japanese: わかってたのに。でも‥‥
English: I knew that. I knew that, but...

Japanese: ＫＢ警備をクビになって、 おカネがなくなっちゃったら‥‥
English: Once I got fired from KB Security and lost all the money I had...

Japanese: ボクなんか、なんの とりえもミリョクもないし‥‥
English: ...she wouldn't have any reason to stay with me.

Japanese: まれかちゃん、きっと いなくなっちゃう、って思って。
English: I thought, she would leave me for sure.

Japanese: だから‥‥怪人に‥‥？
English: So, that's why you became Mask☆DeMasque...?

Japanese: え、ええ‥‥。 でも、もう‥‥オシマイです。
English: Yes... But, it's all over now...

Japanese: 割れたおちゃわんは‥‥ 元には戻りませーーーん！
English: A broken bowl can never be put back together!

Japanese: そ、そんなコトありませんよ！ ね、なるほどくん！
English: Th-That's not true! Right, Nick!?

Japanese: え。
English: Right.

Japanese: ほ‥‥ホントですか！ ホントに戻るんですか！
English: R-Really!? Can we go back to the way things were!?

Japanese: だいじょうぶ！　なるほどくんが 証明してくれますから！
English: You'll be fine! And Nick can prove it!

Japanese: （い、いきなりそんなコト 言われてもコマるけど‥‥）
English: (I can? I kind of wish you would check with me first...)

Japanese: 優作くん。割れたおちゃわんも、 いつか元に戻るコトもあるよ。
English: Mr. DeLite, even if a bowl is broken, there is always a way to put it back together.

Japanese: ‥‥ありがとう、成歩堂さん。 なぐさめてくれて。
English: ...Thank you, Mr. Wright. For trying to cheer me up.

Japanese: いいんですよ、ムリしなくて。
English: You don't have to put on a brave face just for me.
...Huh?

Japanese: ボク‥‥ヒトリになって もう一度、考えてみますから。
English: I think I'm going to go off by myself and think things over for a while.

Japanese: あ‥‥優作さん！
English: Wait...! Mr. DeLite!

Japanese: さようなら！　成歩堂さん！
English: Farewell! Mr. Wright!

Japanese: 行っちゃった‥‥
English: He's gone...

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥今の証拠、 ちがったみたいだな‥‥）
English: (I guess that didn't do much to make him feel any better...)

Japanese: ねえ、リューイチくん！
English: Hey, Nicky boy!

Japanese: ま、まれかさん‥‥
English: M-Ms. DeLite...

Japanese: ユーサクくんがいないんだけど ‥‥知らないかな？
English: I haven't seen Ronnie... Do you know where he is?

Japanese: そ、それは‥‥
English: W-Well...

Japanese: せっかく、ムザイのお祝い パーティーの用意、したのになあ。
English: And here I was all ready to throw him a great big "Not Guilty" party...

Japanese: 《倉院のツボ》‥‥まれかちゃんが 見つけてきてくれた‥‥
English: The Sacred Urn... Dessie was the one who found this...

Japanese: まれかさんは‥‥いつでも 信じてるんだよ、優作くんのコト。
English: Desirée, your wife... She's always believed in you, Ron.

Japanese: ‥‥だから、だいじょうぶ。 何もシンパイはいらないと思うよ。
English: That's why you'll be fine. You don't have to worry about anything.

Japanese: あ！　いたいた！
English: Ah! There you are!

Japanese: ま‥‥まれかさん。
English: M-Ms. DeLite.

Japanese: やったね、ユーサクくん！ ムザイだよムザイ！
English: You did it, Ronnie! You're innocent! I'm so happy!

Japanese: あ、ああああ、ありがとう！ ‥‥でも、その。
English: Th-Thank you. I-I appreciate that... But, um...

Japanese: まれかちゃんはもう、 ボクなんて、あの。
English: I-I suppose you don't w-want anything more to do with me, do you...?

Japanese: ユーサクくん！　どうしてキチンと 話してくれなかったかなー。
English: Ronnie! Why didn't you talk to me about what was going on!?

Japanese: ＫＢ警備をやめたなんて アタシ、知らなかったんだもん。
English: I had no idea you'd quit KB Security.

Japanese: まさか、ホントに 怪人やってたとはねー。
English: I never imagined that you were really Mask☆DeMasque either!

Japanese: ま、まれかさん‥‥それを 知っちゃって、どうするんですか？
English: Ms. DeLite... What are you going to do now that you know?

Japanese: ‥‥まさか‥‥
English: Y-You're not going to really leave him, are you?

Japanese: ‥‥決まってるでしょ？
English: Come on, it's obvious, isn't it?

Japanese: そんなスリリングなこと、 見逃すハズがないじゃない！
English: How could I ever let a wonderful man like him get away?

Japanese: アタシのバイク、 シャレ抜きで飛ぶからさ。
English: After all, my bike's really fast.

Japanese: ゼーッタイ、逃げおくれる なんて、あり得ないからね！
English: So fast that there's no way he could ever get away!

Japanese: あの‥‥たしか、犯罪者は ユルせなかったのでは‥‥？
English: Um... But didn't you say that you hated criminals...?

Japanese: んー？　アタシがユルせないのは、 ヒキョウなマネをするヤツだよ。
English: Hm? Oh! I only hate people who act all cowardly and sneaky.

Japanese: ‥‥あの探偵みたいに。
English: Like that detective.

Japanese: ‥‥なるほどね‥‥
English: I see...

Japanese: ユーサクくん、正々堂々と 予告状で宣戦布告しちゃって。
English: My Ronnie went and declared his crimes before he committed them, like a man!

Japanese: アタシ、大スキなんだよねー、 そういう、スポーツマンシップ。
English: I just love a man who's so chivalrous!

Japanese: すぽーつまん‥‥
English: Chivalrous...?

Japanese: ‥‥やっぱり、アタシの 予感は正しかったよ。
English: I knew I was right about you.

Japanese: ユーサクくんといれば、 スリリングな毎日を送れる、って。
English: Every day I spend with you is filled with thrills and excitement!

Japanese: ま、まれかちゃん‥‥
English: D-Dessie...

Japanese: （まれかさん‥‥優作くんのこと、 ホントに好きなんだな‥‥）
English: (Desirée... You really do love Ron, don't you...?)

Japanese: ‥‥ねえ、リューイチくん。
English: Nicky boy...

Japanese: は、はい。
English: Y-Yes?

Japanese: リューイチくんに弁護を おねがいして、本当によかったよ。
English: I'm really glad I asked you to defend my Ronnie.

Japanese: どうもありがとう！ アタシ、ずっと忘れないから。
English: Thank you so much! I'll never forget what you've done for us.

Japanese: いや、まあ、その。 ‥‥お元気で。
English: Oh, well, um... Take care of yourself.

Japanese: リューイチくんもね。
English: You too, Nicky boy.

Japanese: （うう‥‥カオが赤くなってきた）
English: (*gulp*... I can feel my face going red.)

Japanese: なるほどくん！　真宵さま！ おめでとうございます！
English: Mr. Nick! Mystic Maya! Congratulations!

Japanese: ‥‥って、まあ！
English: *gasp!*

Japanese: （ささ、サイアクの タイミングだ‥‥）
English: (...Talk about bad timing.)

Japanese: なるほどくんッ！
English: Mr. Nick! How could you!?

Japanese: 真宵さまの前で！
English: With another man's wife!

Japanese: ヒトさまの奥方と！
English: In front of Mystic Maya!

Japanese: ちちちち、ちが
English: No no no! You've got it all wrong!

Japanese: ユルしませんっ！
English: I'll NEVER forgive you!! Never! Ever!

Japanese: ぼくの意識はうすれて行き‥‥ そして、事件は終わった。
English: So just as the case came to a close, so too did my consciousness.

Japanese: “割れたおちゃわんは、元には 戻らない”‥‥優作くんは言う。
English: Ron said, "a broken bowl can never be put back together."

Japanese: でも、そんなコトはないハズだ。
English: But I know that's not true.

Japanese: だって‥‥そうだよ。
English: I mean, just look.

Japanese: 割れたツボだって、こうして 元に戻ったわけだからね‥‥。
English: Here's a perfect example of one that was put back together even better than before.

Japanese: ■第２話　盗まれた逆転 おわり
English: Episode 2: The Stolen Turnabout THE END
